name: Baked Huevos Rancheros
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, green bell pepper, and garlic in oil over medium heat until softened.
2. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute, ensuring no lumps form.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato, oregano, cumin, chili powder, salt, pepper, and white wine) to the skillet. Cook over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour the mixture into a 12x8x2 inch baking dish. Cover with foil.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour (or up to overnight).
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and remove from refrigerator.
7. Make 6 indentations in the sauce, then carefully break an egg into each indentation.
8. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese, black olives, and chopped scallion over the eggs.
9. Bake for 15 minutes or until eggs are set. Serve immediately.
